name: matK_Angiosperms_eudicots
description: Plastid matK (maturase K, ~1500 bp; barcode window ~800 bp) for plant group Angiosperms_eudicots. Eudicotyledonous flowering plants — bulk of land flora. Faster-evolving than rbcL, better species-level resolution. CBOL 2009 paired barcode with rbcL. Allow high mismatch.
